case_title: DANIEL HONG VS. DANIELLE ZAYA JAUL

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HONG, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT JAUL, DANIELLE ZAYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2015 - JUDGMENT.
